title: GateDiagnostic
description:
Persistent record of gate failures from a pipeline run.

Written to `.assay/reviews/<spec>/<run-id>-gates.json` when a run
completes with gate failures. Read by `assay spec review` to show
failure details alongside structural checks.

# Security note

Diagnostic files may contain output captured from gate commands (see
[`FailedCriterionSummary::stderr_snippet`]). Gate commands are arbitrary
shell commands, so their output could theoretically include sensitive data
(API keys, tokens, passwords) if a failing command printed them to stderr.
Treat `.assay/reviews/` with the same access controls as `.assay/sessions/`.

checkpoint_index.description: Index of the checkpoint that failed (0-based). `None` for session-end gates.

session_phase.description:
The pipeline phase at which the gate was evaluated.
Defaults to `SessionEnd` for pre-M024 diagnostics (D028).

spec.description: Spec slug this diagnostic is for.

FailedCriterionSummary.description: Summary of a single failed gate criterion for diagnostic persistence.

command.description: The command that was executed (if any).

criterion_name.description: Name of the criterion that failed.

exit_code.description: Exit code from the command (if applicable).

stderr_snippet.description: Stderr snippet from the failed command (truncated).

SessionPhase.description:
The phase in a pipeline session at which a checkpoint gate was evaluated.

Lives in `review` (not `gate` or `pipeline`) per D029 — phase is a
diagnostic concern that belongs next to [`GateDiagnostic`].

Accessed as `assay_types::review::SessionPhase` — deliberately NOT
re-exported at the crate root to avoid collision with the workflow
`SessionPhase` in `work_session`.

oneOf.description: Gate was evaluated at a tool-call checkpoint (`n` = tool call count).

n.description: Number of tool calls emitted when the checkpoint fired.

oneOf.description: Gate was evaluated when a specific event type was observed.

event_type.description: The event type tag that triggered the checkpoint.

oneOf.description: Gate was evaluated at the end of the session.
